# TranSyT reaction -> ModelSEED reaction mapping.
# Format: transyt_rxn_id\t[modelseed_rxn_id]  (TranSyT emits the id bracketed)
# Only reactions matched to a ModelSEED template appear here; the rest carry
# their stoichiometry in the SBML and are emitted as TRANSYT_RXN equations.
TR0001	[rxn05145]
